---
id: patch-a-configuration-section
title: "Patch a configuration section"
description: "Updates a specific section of the configuration (e.g. webdav, auth, health, rclone)"
sidebar_label: "Patch a configuration section"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: docs/4. API/altmount-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Patch a configuration section"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/api/config/{section}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates a specific section of the configuration (e.g. webdav, auth, health, rclone)
